response.justification: Bogdan is a talented full-stack software engineer with 14 years of industry experience and MIT credentials, meeting the educational baseline. However, the role requires specialized hardware expertise—SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design—that is entirely absent from his background. His career is purely software-focused (web, backend, DevOps, mobile) with no evidence of hardware architecture, accelerator optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis critical to this principal-level position.
strengths: Meets educational requirement with MIT CS degree and 14+ years of industry experience at principal/staff level
Demonstrates system architecture thinking and performance optimization awareness in microservices and backend contexts
Shows ability to rapidly master new technical domains and mentor others through workshops and technical talks
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware description languages (Verilog, SystemVerilog), or hardware design—all required skills
No background in GPU architecture, AI accelerators, or deep-learning workload optimization—core to the role
Career is entirely software-focused; lacks hardware-software co-design expertise and SIMD/MIMD architecture knowledge

key_factors.factor: Missing hardware/accelerator domain expertise and SoC modeling skills
No GPU architecture or deep-learning inference optimization experience
Educational credentials and tenure meet baseline requirements
